text:
All-new Kia EV6 The Electric Superstar

*Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ.

Electrifying.

Immersive. Yours.

Designed to inspire, the EV6 blends bold aerodynamics with a striking presence, while its immersive interior surrounds you with innovation, comfort, and control. From the signature LED taillights to the panoramic curved display, every detail is crafted to turn motion into emotion.

Because the future isn’t just about where you go, but how you feel getting there.

LED Projection Lamp Sharper vision. Smarter illumination.

Wide Electric Sunroof Limitless skies that power pure inspiration.

Smart Power Tailgate Smart, seamless, and made for you.

Ventilated Front Seat Experience refined comfort with ventilated seating.

Driver and Passenger Premium Relaxation Seats Sit back, stretch out, and embrace the future of comfort.

*Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ.

Ultra-fast Charging The road never waits. Neither should you. 10% to 80% charge in 18 mins*.

Vehicle-to-Load & Vehicle-to- Vehicle (V2L & V2V) Energy on demand, from your EV6 to your world.

All Wheel Drive Maximum traction for effortless performance.

Go the Distance Go farther. Charge less. Explore more with 663 km range**.

Instant Adrenaline From zero to thrill (0-100 Kmph) in just 5.3 seconds.

Precision, power, and pure electric excitement.

The thrill of acceleration, the freedom of long-range travel, and the ease of ultra-fast charging. The EV6 redefines electric performance with superior control, being an electric machine that is built to lead the way.

*Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ.

*With 350 kW charger. **Range is ARAI certified MIDC full.

Beyond electric.

Beyond connected.

Your EV6, your way. Kia Connect 2.0 brings seamless connectivity with smart navigation, real-time vehicle insights, and remote controls at your fingertips. Whether unlocking your car, adjusting settings, or planning your next route, technology moves with you.

The Meridian Premium Sound System with 14 Speaker Pure Meridian sound. Immersive every time.

Dual 31.24cm (12.3”) Panoramic Curved Display The integrated curved display, with maximum visibility and Intuitiveness.

Digital Key 2.0 Seamless access, remote control, and smart sharing at your fingertips.

Over-the-Air (OTA) Software Updates From new features to optimized performance, OTA keeps your EV6 always up to date.

Augmented Reality Head-up Display Essential driving data displayed where you need it most.

*Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ.

Innovation that sees, reacts, and protects.

Designed for movement, engineered for safety. ADAS 2.0 ensures that every drive is backed by intelligent safety features, from lane departure warnings to smart collision avoidance, because true innovation doesn’t just move, it protects.

Rear Cross-Traffic Collision- Avoidance Assist (RCTA) Warns in case a vehicle or pedestrian is coming while reversing.

Forward Collision Avoidance Assist Alerts you and brakes when a vehicle or pedestrian appears suddenly.

Safe Exit Assist Keeps doors locked when an unseen risk approaches.

Forward/Side/Rear Parking Collision-Avoidance Assist Shields you from unexpected obstacles while parking.

Blind-Spot Detection (BSD) Reduces the risk of collision with vehicles in the adjacent lane or coming from behind.

*Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ.

*Terms & Conditions Apply. The product & feature images shown in this brochure is for representation purpose only. Product shown is an overseas model. India specification may differ. Features and specifications as shown may not be part of standard fitment and may vary.

The colors shown are subject to availability and may not be available across all variants and may differ slightly from those shown in this brochure. Not all seat and interior colors are applicable in all trims. Kia Connect 2.0 functionality is dependant on mobile network strength. ~Front (Driver & Passenger), 2 Side Airbags, 2 Curtain Airbags & 2 side center airbags. #Range is ARAI certified MIDC full. The individual driving style and other factors, such as speed, outside temperature, topography and the use of electricity-consuming devices/units, have an influence on the real life range and can possibly reduce it. ^With R 19 alloy wheel. **Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) is not a substitute for human eye and driver vigilance. It is an assistance feature that enhances driving experience and safety. Effectiveness of ADAS may vary based on actual situation and all objects around vehicle may not be detected. The driver shall remain responsible for safe, vigilant, and attentive driving. Kia India Pvt. Ltd.
